project.title: The Last Data
project.target_platform: Manual AI video generation: WeDaVinci, PixVerse.ai, Seedance

source_script: The Last Data: a future architectural data worker thinks scanning and uploading civilization data is meaningless. During an extinction-level impact alert, conflict with the boss escalates. After the catastrophe, the protagonist wakes in ruins, discovers the Civilization Archive hard drive, and the stored data becomes the basis for rebuilding the city as blue holographic architecture.
global_constraints: Part 1 is Code/NLP Workflow: input script, call local Ollama API, generate prompt table and iteration record.
Part 2 is Manual AI Video Production Workflow: manually enter final prompts into WeDaVinci, PixVerse.ai, Seedance, or equivalent tool.
Do not claim that WeDaVinci is called by code.
Preserve shot order, tool attribution, reference images, output paths, and iteration issues from the workbook.
Do not invent missing video files or generated assets.

iteration_history.change:
Keep the same futuristic architectural civilization data office, the same protagonist, the same boss, the same desk, the same set of blue architectural scanning screens, and the same city background outside the window. Continue directly from the abnormal screen flicker in the final second of the previous shot. Do not change the office, characters, clothing, or camera angle.

Medium-wide shot, slightly low angle, stable camera. The camera follows the protagonist’s line of sight slightly upward, gradually pushing toward the boss and the red emergency warning light.

The protagonist’s exhausted expression instantly shifts into nervous confusion. His fingers freeze above the keyboard, while his right hand still grips the black hard drive tightly. He raises his eyes toward the alarm source above and to the side. His expression changes from impatience to confusion and tension, but he does not stand up or run away.

The boss stands behind the protagonist. At first, he stays silent for a few seconds and also looks upward toward the direction of the warning. His expression shifts from anger to brief shock. Then he suppresses his emotions, points back at the upload progress bar, and returns to a cold, forceful, bureaucratic expression.

Outside the window, the city remains visible. Dark clouds in the distance grow deeper, and faint firelight slowly begins to appear far away.

The lighting is based on cold white fluorescent lights and blue screen glow. A red emergency warning light begins to rotate, sweeping pulses of red light across the desk, the characters’ faces, and the glass window. The visual mood shifts from cold blue office lighting into an urgent red-and-blue emergency atmosphere.

0-2 seconds: A red warning interface pops up on the screen, and the emergency warning light begins rotating.
2-4 seconds: The emergency broadcast begins. The boss and the protagonist listen in confusion.
4-6 seconds: The protagonist prepares to stand up and evacuate, but the boss points back at the upload progress bar and says, “Upload the data first. Evacuate after the upload.”

Continuous sounds: alarm siren, fluorescent electrical buzzing, screen glitch sounds, low scanner hum.
Sudden sounds: red alarm activation sound, broadcast system connection sound.
Volume change: the alarm begins suddenly and harshly, then the broadcast voice rises above the office ambience.

Broadcast voice:
“Global emergency notice. Extinction-level impact event confirmed. All personnel prepare for evacuation immediately.”

After a pause, the boss says:
“Upload the data first. Evacuate after the upload.”

No extra dialogue.

Negative prompt: obvious explosion, severe impact disaster, visible meteor, major destruction, falling debris, collapsed buildings, city destroyed, panic crowd, evacuation already completed, different office, different characters, different clothing, different camera angle, protagonist without hard drive, subtitles, narration, watermark, logo.
iteration_history.reason:
镜头连续性（continuity）和时间节拍（timing beats）不严谨：

1.本来是近景镜头，新片段又是远镜头推进近。（是我未考虑到尾帧镜头大小导致错误）
2.主人公应在警报人声停了之后才准备起身，boss在人声警报声停了之后，主人公准备起身是开始说话，并慢慢转身准备离开。
3.先产生短促多次的滴滴滴刺耳的鸣笛提示引起注意，再出现人声警报，人声消失后，鸣笛依旧存在。在boss开始说话时减弱逐渐减弱音量变为背景音。
iteration_history.result: Prompt revised in prompt_image_video.xlsx and reflected in final_input_output_videos.

iteration_history.change:
Maintain the same futuristic architectural civilization data office, the same protagonist, the same boss, the same desk, the same blue architectural scanning screens, the same rotating holographic building model, and the same city skyline outside the window. This shot begins immediately after the previous shot ends, continuing from the moment the red warning frame first appears on the monitor. Do not change the office, characters, costumes, desk layout, or scene continuity.

Camera:
Start from the same medium shot scale as the previous shot. Do NOT reset to a wider establishing shot. The camera remains stable and continuous. During the scene, the camera slowly pulls back from a medium shot into a wider full-office composition, gradually revealing more of the office environment, the red emergency lighting, and the growing threat outside the windows. Slight low-angle perspective.

Composition:
The protagonist remains seated in the foreground at the same desk. The boss stands behind him in the same position. The main monitor and upload progress bar remain visible throughout the shot. The rotating holographic architectural model remains continuously visible and rotating for the entire duration of the scene.

Protagonist:
Exhausted and emotionally drained at first. His fingers stop above the keyboard when the alarm begins. His right hand continues gripping the black hard drive tightly. He looks upward toward the source of the warning. His expression changes from annoyance to confusion, then tension. During the emergency broadcast he remains seated and listening. He does NOT attempt to stand up while the broadcast is speaking.

Boss:
Standing behind the protagonist. Initially angry and impatient. When the emergency alert begins he becomes briefly silent and looks toward the warning source. His expression shifts from irritation to temporary shock. During the broadcast he says nothing. Only after the broadcast voice completely finishes does he regain control of his emotions, return to a cold bureaucratic attitude, and point again toward the upload progress bar.

Background:
Cold futuristic office environment. Blue architectural scanning screens. Gray desk. Black mesh office chair. Office equipment, cables and documents remain unchanged. Outside the window, the city is still intact. Dark storm clouds continue gathering. A distant orange glow gradually appears and slowly grows brighter throughout the shot. The fire glow becomes noticeably larger by the end of the scene, but no visible explosion, impact event, meteor, or collapsing buildings are shown.

Lighting:
Cold white fluorescent office lighting and blue monitor light dominate at first. Red emergency warning lights activate and begin rotating. Red light repeatedly sweeps across the protagonist's face, the boss's face, the desk, the hard drive, the rotating holographic building model, and the office windows. The atmosphere gradually shifts from cold blue office lighting to alternating blue-red emergency lighting.

Story Timing:

0–1.5 seconds:
Several short, sharp electronic warning beeps suddenly begin.
“Beep. Beep. Beep. Beep.”
The office lights flicker.
The red warning interface appears.
The red emergency light starts rotating.

1.5–4.5 seconds:
The emergency broadcast activates.
Both the protagonist and the boss remain silent and listen.
Neither character attempts to move or leave.
The holographic building model continues rotating normally.

Broadcast Voice:
"Global emergency notice."
"Extinction-level impact event confirmed."
"All personnel must prepare for evacuation immediately."

4.5–5 seconds:
The broadcast voice ends completely.
A brief moment of silence follows except for the continuing warning beeps.

5–7 seconds:
The protagonist finally begins preparing to stand up and leave.
His shoulders move first.
His chair shifts slightly.
He begins turning away from the desk.

At this exact moment the boss suddenly points toward the upload progress bar and interrupts him.

Boss:
"Upload the data first."
"Evacuate after the upload is complete."

7–9 seconds:
The protagonist slowly turns his head back toward the boss.
The warning beeps continue but gradually decrease in volume, becoming background sound underneath the boss's voice.
The upload progress bar remains almost motionless.
The distant fire glow outside the window becomes larger and brighter.

Sound Design:

Continuous sounds:
Fluorescent electrical hum.
Scanner low-frequency hum.
Computer system noise.
Rotating holographic projection hum.

Alert sounds:
Multiple short sharp warning beeps first.
Emergency broadcast second.
Warning beeps continue after the broadcast ends.

Audio mix:
The beeps are initially loud and attention-grabbing.
The broadcast voice temporarily becomes the dominant sound.
After the broadcast ends, the beeps remain active.
When the boss begins speaking, the warning beeps gradually reduce in volume and become background ambience.

Dialogue:

Broadcast:
"Global emergency notice."
"Extinction-level impact event confirmed."
"All personnel must prepare for evacuation immediately."

Boss:
"Upload the data first."
"Evacuate after the upload."

No other dialogue.

Restrictions:
No visible meteor.
No explosion.
No impact event shown.
No collapsing buildings.
No falling debris.
No city destruction.
No evacuation crowds.
No running people.
No additional dialogue.
No subtitles.
No narration.
No camera reset.
No office change.
No character change.
No costume change.
The protagonist must keep holding the black hard drive throughout the scene.
The holographic architectural model must continue rotating during the entire sequence.
iteration_history.result: Prompt revised in prompt_image_video.xlsx and reflected in final_input_output_videos.

iteration_history.change: boss形象与参考图中站立的微胖男性一致，微胖。主人公眉头紧锁形成褶皱，双眼瞪大露出虹膜边缘，眼神愤怒地的盯着boss。脸部充血发红，额头青筋暴起。咬肌紧绷下颌突出，嘴角扭曲成怒吼状。室内闪烁红色警报灯与冷色调科技蓝光相混合。窗外是红色火花与逐渐坍塌的建筑。
iteration_history.result: Prompt revised in prompt_image_video.xlsx and reflected in final_input_output_videos.

shots.title: Office establishing shot
shots.method: text to image to video in Wedavinci
shots.image_prompt: Wide establishing shot of the @ArchitectureDataOffice, cold fluorescent lights flickering overhead, rows of desks stretching into shadow, blue holographic building models rotating silently
shots.video_prompt: Wide establishing shot of the @ArchitectureDataOffice, cold fluorescent lights flickering overhead, rows of desks stretching into shadow, blue holographic building models rotating silently

shots.title: Office pressure and upload routine
shots.method: text to image to video in Wedavinci
shots.image_prompt:
[Shot]
Type: Overhead wide shot of the office, slowly pushing in toward the protagonist
Movement: Push-in (slow)
Speed: Normal
Focal length: 50mm standard lens

[Lighting]
Key light: Cool fluorescent office lights (ceiling lights)
Light position: Overhead (evenly distributed)
Light quality: Hard light (cool color tone)
Lighting effect: High contrast (cold blue tone)
Dynamic lighting: Fluorescent lights buzzing softly (slight flickering)

[Blocking and Composition]
Composition type: Oppressive front-low / back-high positioning
Spatial relationship: Close distance (standing behind, about 50 cm away), rear angle (the boss is behind the protagonist), top-down height difference (the boss is standing, the protagonist is sitting)
Visual focus: Protagonist centered, boss in the background

[Protagonist]@Protagonist
Expression: Tired, impatient
Action: Working with head lowered, fingers tapping on the keyboard
Body posture: Sitting, leaning forward (staring at the screen)
Hand details: Right hand holding a hard drive @Device, left hand mechanically typing (with a hollow, numb feeling), fingers stiff.
Facial muscle details: Drooping eyelids, corners of the mouth slightly turned downward

[Supporting / Opposing Character]@Boss
Expression: Stern, frowning
Action: Standing behind the protagonist, looking down at the protagonist’s screen
Body posture: Standing, pointing at the protagonist while scolding with the right hand
Hand details: Right hand pointing angrily at the holographic projection on the desk

[Character Relationship]
Distance: Close (standing behind, about 50 cm away)
Angle: Rear angle (the boss is behind the protagonist)
Height difference: Looking down (the boss is standing, the protagonist is sitting)

[Skin Texture and Appearance Details]
Skin texture: Slight dark circles under the eyes (showing fatigue), visible pores
Skin tone: Pale (from long-term indoor work)
Physiological reaction: None
Appearance details: The data collector’s uniform is neat, but slightly worn-out

[Background]@ArchitechtureOffice
Interior: Office, blue architectural scanning interface, rotating holographic model, an upload progress bar moving so slowly it feels suffocating
Outside the window: Ruined city (not shown in the first scene, to preserve suspense)
Dynamic elements: Holographic model rotating (slowly), upload progress bar (almost motionless)

[Ambient Sound]
Continuous sound: Keyboard typing (mechanical, hollow, background sound)
Volume change: Keyboard typing (soft) → alarm sound (gradually increasing)

[Dialogue]
Boss: “Why is this so slow?!”

Boss: “The latest data must be uploaded today.”
Protagonist: (Does not argue, continues scanning the architectural model)
Boss: “We’re running out of time.” (angrily accusing)
Protagonist: (Silent, with clear impatience already showing on his face)

[Ending Transition]
A red warning pop-up suddenly appears on the computer screen, and the red light reflects onto the protagonist’s face.

[Style and Texture Parameters]
Medium: 35mm film photography
Art style anchor: Post-apocalyptic sci-fi atmosphere, cool color palette
Sensory texture description: Harsh, husky light; cold metallic texture

Negative words:No obvious disasters, such as explosions or similar large-scale destruction.

 @Protagonist @Device

shots.title: Emergency alert interruption
shots.method: text to image to video in Wedavinci
shots.image_prompt:
0-1 seconds:
Several short, sharp warning beeps suddenly ring out across the office: beep, beep, beep. A red warning interface flashes onto the main monitor. The cold white fluorescent lights begin to flicker, and the red emergency warning light starts rotating.

1-3 seconds:
The emergency broadcast voice begins. The protagonist and the boss both raise their heads, looking toward the alarm source with confusion and tension. The protagonist remains seated and has not yet prepared to evacuate. The boss stays silent, briefly shocked.

Broadcast voice:
“Global emergency notice. Extinction-level impact event confirmed. All personnel prepare for evacuation immediately.”

3-4 seconds:
The broadcast voice ends. The sharp warning beeps continue in the background. The protagonist finally reacts; his posture loosens for a moment, then suddenly tightens. He begins preparing to stand up from the chair while still holding the black hard drive.

4-6 seconds:
As the protagonist begins to rise and slowly turns as if preparing to leave, the boss suppresses his shock and sharply points back at the upload progress bar. The warning beeps gradually decrease in volume and become background sound while the boss begins to speak.

Boss says:
“Upload the data first. Evacuate after the upload.”

The boss’s expression becomes cold, forceful, and bureaucratic again. The protagonist freezes halfway through standing, caught between the instinct to evacuate and the pressure to obey.

Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio.

Broadcast voice:

3-4 seconds:

4-6 seconds:
As the protagonist begins to rise and slowly turns as if preparing to leave, the boss suppresses his shock and sharply points back at the upload progress bar. The warning beeps gradually decrease in volume and become background sound while the boss begins to speak.

Boss says:
“Upload the data first. Evacuate after the upload.”

The boss’s expression becomes cold, forceful, and bureaucratic again. The protagonist freezes halfway through standing, caught between the instinct to evacuate and the pressure to obey.

Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio.

shots.title: Fist close-up
shots.image_prompt:
3 second：His fingers slowly curl inward.

The fist tightens.

Knuckles turn white.

Veins become visible beneath the skin.

A slight tremor runs through his hand. with professional cinematography and dramatic lighting
shots.video_prompt:
3 second：His fingers slowly curl inward.

The fist tightens.

Knuckles turn white.

shots.title: Explosion transition
shots.method: 4 seconds. The apocalypse begins: an explosion erupts, sending shockwaves and dust through the scene. Flames rush toward the camera, glass shatters, and the debris completely covers the entire frame.
shots.image_prompt: Based on the final frame of the previous video:
shots.video_prompt: Based on the final frame of the previous video:

shots.title: Confrontation with boss
shots.image_prompt:
in the same @Officefull  @Protagonist rushes forward, grabs the @Boss by the collar, and violently slams him onto the office desk.

The desk shakes from the impact. Documents, architectural drawings, folders, and office supplies scatter across the floor.

Red emergency warning lights flash frantically throughout the office while blue holographic architectural models continue rotating overhead.

Leaning close to the boss, the protagonist completely loses control and shouts in rage:

"Scanning every day!"

"Uploading every day!"

"What is any of this even for?!"

"The world is ending!"

"Who still cares about the data?!"

His anger gradually turns into despair.

Outside the floor-to-ceiling windows, distant fires grow larger with every second. The red glow intensifies, spreading across the city skyline and slowly overpowering the blue technological light inside the office.

Alarm sirens become faster and more urgent. Background music rises toward a climax.

Cinematic photorealism, intense dramatic confrontation, emotional breakdown, handheld camera movement, flashing red emergency lights mixed with blue futuristic technology lighting, escalating tension, apocalyptic atmosphere, film-quality visuals.

shots.title: Waking in the ruins
shots.image_prompt:
黑屏开始。强烈耳鸣、沉重呼吸、远处建筑坍塌声与金属摩擦声。第一人称视角。眼皮半睁半闭，黑色眼皮阴影遮挡视野。第一次睁眼仅睁开一半又无力闭合，随后缓慢重新睁开。画面逐渐显现，模糊失焦，轻微重影，焦点不断恢复。最终聚焦到废墟中的天空视角。一镜到底，真实人类昏迷后苏醒效果。
镜头1
第一人称视角保持不变。主人公用双手撑住地面缓慢起身，镜头从仰躺视角逐渐抬升至坐姿视角。视线从天空转向前方废墟。越来越多毁灭后的城市进入视野。真实人体运动轨迹，轻微晃动与呼吸感，一镜到底。
镜头2
第一人称视角凝视废墟城市。镜头从主人公双眼位置缓慢向后穿出头部，自然脱离身体。后脑逐渐进入画面，随后露出完整背影。平滑过渡到第三人称背影视角。一镜到底，无切镜头。
镜头3
保持同一主人公与同一城市布局。镜头持续向后平稳移动，同时缓慢向斜上方升高。从中景逐渐变为远景。城市尺度不断扩大。越来越多毁灭后的建筑进入画面。主人公比例持续缩小。最终形成高空俯瞰视角，完整展现毁灭后的未来城市全貌。电影级无人机运镜。
镜头4

shots.title: Activating the civilization archive hard drive
shots.image_prompt:
Main subjects:

Scene:

A ruined city in the background, completely blurred with an extremely shallow depth of field. The environment is filled with a faint, continuous wind sound and subtle electrical buzzing.

Style:

Extreme close-up / macro cinematography, shallow depth of field, cool-toned and low saturation, post-apocalyptic wasteland atmosphere, with blue technological light effects and a rough, gritty visual texture.

Music:

Slow ambient music with no clear beat, built on deep, sustained synthesizer bass, creating a mysterious, vast, and slightly melancholic mood.

Action / Story:

The shot moves from a medium shot into a close-up. The protagonist is sitting in the ruins. As he supports himself with his right hand on the ground, he feels an unusual object beneath his palm and looks down. A hard drive, half-buried in dust, is revealed.

He picks up the hard drive with his right hand. The camera shifts to a close-up as he wipes dust from its surface with his left thumb. The worn metallic shell gradually becomes visible, and the words “CIVILIZATION ARCHIVE” appear.

Cut to a third-person medium close shot. The protagonist stands at the edge of the ruins, holding the hard drive with both hands. His expression shifts from confusion to shock. The surrounding environmental sounds fade, leaving only the wind.

He slowly moves his thumb toward the power button on the side of the hard drive. After a brief pause, he presses it firmly.

A low electronic startup sound begins. Instantly, a blue indicator light along the edge of the hard drive turns on. Blue energy light rapidly spreads along the metal edges, and a bright blue scanning beam sweeps quickly across the entire surface of the hard drive from left to right. The blue glow illuminates the protagonist’s face as he stares at the device in shock.

The scene ends the moment the scan is completed, setting up the next sequence in which the holographic system activates.

This is Scene S3-2: Activating the Hard Drive.
shots.video_prompt:
Main subjects:

Scene:

A ruined city in the background, completely blurred with an extremely shallow depth of field. The environment is filled with a faint, continuous wind sound and subtle electrical buzzing.

Style:

Extreme close-up / macro cinematography, shallow depth of field, cool-toned and low saturation, post-apocalyptic wasteland atmosphere, with blue technological light effects and a rough, gritty visual texture.

Music:

Slow ambient music with no clear beat, built on deep, sustained synthesizer bass, creating a mysterious, vast, and slightly melancholic mood.

Action / Story:

The shot moves from a medium shot into a close-up. The protagonist is sitting in the ruins. As he supports himself with his right hand on the ground, he feels an unusual object beneath his palm and looks down. A hard drive, half-buried in dust, is revealed.

He picks up the hard drive with his right hand. The camera shifts to a close-up as he wipes dust from its surface with his left thumb. The worn metallic shell gradually becomes visible, and the words “CIVILIZATION ARCHIVE” appear.

Cut to a third-person medium close shot. The protagonist stands at the edge of the ruins, holding the hard drive with both hands. His expression shifts from confusion to shock. The surrounding environmental sounds fade, leaving only the wind.

He slowly moves his thumb toward the power button on the side of the hard drive. After a brief pause, he presses it firmly.

A low electronic startup sound begins. Instantly, a blue indicator light along the edge of the hard drive turns on. Blue energy light rapidly spreads along the metal edges, and a bright blue scanning beam sweeps quickly across the entire surface of the hard drive from left to right. The blue glow illuminates the protagonist’s face as he stares at the device in shock.

The scene ends the moment the scan is completed, setting up the next sequence in which the holographic system activates.

This is Scene S3-2: Activating the Hard Drive.
shots.notes: Workbook image_ref normalized: A young white male wearing a gray-brown jacket. | Workbook output_ref normalized: A silver metallic external hard drive with the words “CIVILIZATION ARCHIVE” printed on it.

shots.title: One-shot reconstruction
shots.image_prompt:
固定镜头。 世界末日后的废墟。 教堂已经坍塌。 地面布满碎石和残骸。 浓烟缓慢飘动。 空气中漂浮灰尘。 远处偶尔有火光。 超写实。 电影级灾难场景。
镜头1
固定镜头。 废墟地面开始出现蓝色扫描光。 无数蓝色粒子从地下升起。 从无到有，光影迅速构建出建筑的轮廓线条，并按顺时针快转动。蓝色的全息网格向上快速生长、扫描，最终形成完整的全息建筑影像，发光强度高，科技感。 
镜头2
镜头3
镜头快速拉近 穿过末日城市。 两侧是倒塌建筑。 浓烟弥漫。 街道被废墟覆盖。 镜头从楼宇之间高速穿梭。 飞快向前推进 来到图二Tum钟楼场景
镜头4
固定镜头。 废墟地面开始出现蓝色扫描光。 无数蓝色粒子从地下升起。 从无到有，先出现地基线框。 蓝色的全息网格向上快速生长、扫描，塔楼逐层生成，最终形成完整的全息建筑影像，发光强度高，科技感。 
镜头5
镜头6
镜头快速拉近，从钟表窗户穿过钟楼，来到钟楼另一边。镜头向前向上升空。 不断拉高高度。 俯瞰整片废墟城市。 地面依旧残破不堪。 浓烟弥漫。 无数建筑遗址散布城市各处。 世界仿佛已经死亡。 电影级航拍。
镜头7
一道巨大的蓝色扫描波从眼前向远方扩散。 扫描波经过的区域开始出现建筑轮廓。 无数建筑同时生长。 蓝色全息线框从废墟中升起。 街区被重新绘制。 道路轮廓显现。 桥梁生成。 历史建筑重建。 现代建筑重建。 整个城市同时被构建。 仿佛正在重新绘制文明。
镜头8
镜头9
